name: Hazelnut and Vegetable Crumble
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Broil the vegetables in water to cover for 15-20 minutes, or until tender. Drain, reserving the water.
3. Blend about one-third of the vegetables with 2 tablespoons of the butter or vegan margarine and enough of the reserved water to make a puree in a food processor or blender.
4. Add this puree to the rest of the vegetables. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Spoon the mixture into a shallow ovenproof casserole.
6. To make the crumble topping, put the oats into a bowl with all the nuts, the onion, garlic, herbs, and salt and pepper. Add the rest of the butter or vegan margarine, and mix with a fork until the topping mixture resembles coarse breadcrumbs.
7. Sprinkle the crumble mixture evenly over the top of the vegetables.
8. Bake for 30-40 minutes, until the topping is crisp and lightly browned.
